user.description: Select your Account Type. Most users will need to select Google Account. Field Test is only available for selected testers in the Google Field Test program.

auth_method.title: Authentication Method
auth_method.description: Choose how to connect your Nest account. The Chrome Extension method is recommended for most users.

extension.title: Connect with Chrome Extension
extension.description:
1. [Download the Nest Auth Helper extension]({extension_download_url})
2. Unzip and load it in Chrome (chrome://extensions → Developer Mode → Load Unpacked)
3. Sign in to [home.nest.com]({nest_url})
4. Click the extension icon → click **Extract Credentials**
5. Copy the code and paste it below

⚠️ Do not share this code — it contains your session credentials.

data_description.auth_code: The code displayed by the Nest Auth Helper extension

account_link.title: Connect Your Nest Account
account_link.description:
Follow these steps to get your credentials:

1. Open an **Incognito/Private** browser window
2. Enable **third-party cookies** in browser settings
3. Go to [home.nest.com]({nest_url}) and sign in with Google
4. Open **Developer Tools** (F12) → **Network** tab → Check **Preserve Log**
5. In the filter box, type `issueToken` and copy the full **Request URL**
6. In the filter box, type `oauth2/iframe`, click the last request, and copy the entire **Cookie** header value

⚠️ Do not log out of home.nest.com after copying credentials

data_description.cookies: Complete cookie string from the oauth2/iframe request headers

error.invalid_issue_token: Invalid issue token URL. Must start with {accounts_url} and contain the issueToken action.
error.invalid_cookies: Invalid cookies format. Ensure you copied the complete cookie header from the oauth2/iframe request.
error.invalid_code: Invalid authentication code. Make sure you copied the complete code from the extension.
